767395987.english: Death by a thousand cuts ain't fast, but it works!

926985687.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
926985687.jp_real: キーッ！チチチチ！アリンコにでもなった気分じゃのう！
926985687.en_literal: Hehehehehehe! I feel like I've become a little cutie!
926985687.english: Now I know what an ant feels like!

139460766.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
139460766.jp_real: とはいえ、最後まで気は抜けんぞ！
139460766.en_literal: That said, I won't let my guard down until the very end!
139460766.english: Save the high-fives for after we knock this monster down!

818539874.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
818539874.en_literal: It's about time to finish this!

5669740.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
5669740.jp_real: 急所を押さえた！もはや勝負あったも同然！
5669740.en_literal: I've got the upper hand! This fight's already decided!
5669740.english: Alrighty! We finally got to the heart of the matter!

865857296.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
865857296.jp_real: 変幻自在の刃は鋼鉄をも両断するぞ！
865857296.en_literal: The blade of the divine sword will cleave through even adamantium!
865857296.english: Haven't you heard? I can even cut through steel!

593731825.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
593731825.jp_real: 敵の出方をよーく見るんじゃ。隙を逃すなよ！
593731825.en_literal: I'm watching how the enemy moves. Don't miss your chance.
593731825.english: Every foe has a tell, so keep them peepers peeled!

679259155.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
679259155.jp_real: サツイを感じんぶん、少しばかりやりづらいの！
679259155.en_literal: I can feel the heat. A little hard to handle, huh?
679259155.english: Bah! Machines have no art to their warcraft!

923002177.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
923002177.jp_real: こんなもんの相手までせねばならんとはのう
923002177.en_literal: I can't believe I have to fight someone like you.
923002177.english: Must be desperate to sic toys on us!

718847267.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
718847267.jp_real: こちらも譲るわけにはいかんのでな！
718847267.en_literal: I can't afford to lose this one either!
718847267.english: I'll retire when I'm well and ready!

636425056.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
636425056.jp_real: 連携ならば、わしらの方が上手じゃろう！
636425056.en_literal: If we're linking, I'm the one who should be on the offensive!
636425056.english: You can't hope to match our teamwork!

1008081609.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
1008081609.jp_real: リョウショウグンが相手となれば、全力以上で迎えるのが礼儀じゃろて！
1008081609.en_literal: When the opponent is a general, it's only proper to meet them with more than full force!
1008081609.english: We'd better bring out the big guns against two generals!

51831884.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
51831884.jp_real: 抜けば弾散る氷の刃！存分に振るわせてもらうぞ！
51831884.en_literal: I'll let you have a good taste of my ice blade that shatters bullets!
51831884.english: Don't blink or you'll miss the fireworks!

321848122.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
321848122.jp_real: 攻め入るぞ！疾風怒涛の勢いでな！
321848122.en_literal: I'll charge in! With the momentum of the Six Winds!
321848122.english: Channel that rage! And kick his behind!

1026011101.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
1026011101.jp_real: サンショウグンモノコスワオヌシノウミカンネンセイ！
1026011101.en_literal: The Three Supreme Generals leave only one thing behind—eternal hatred!
1026011101.english: After this general goes down, we'll be three for three!

915554350.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
915554350.jp_real: モーハイヤ オクレ ワ トラン!

1053545076.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
1053545076.jp_real: 節約を果たさせてもらおう！

843910079.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
843910079.jp_real: 結着をつける時じゃ、イド！
843910079.en_literal: It's time to settle this! Id!

528016093.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
528016093.jp_real: ムスビの人たち！受けてみろ！
528016093.en_literal: People of the bond! Receive this!
528016093.english: Try this slash on for size!

362848737.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
362848737.jp_real: ナニヤラキナクサクナッテキタガヤルシカナサソウジャノウ！
362848737.en_literal: Looks like things are getting a bit awkward, but we've got no choice but to do it!
362848737.english: I don't like this one iota! What choice do we have?

911201514.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
911201514.en_literal: Attack is the key! Smash them!
911201514.english: Trust in your training and go for the gusto!

777559372.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
777559372.jp_real: 一部のスキも見逃すな！
777559372.en_literal: I won't miss a single opening!
777559372.english: Soon as you see an opening, take it!

255813336.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
255813336.jp_real: また立ち塞がるならば、相手になってやるわい！
255813336.en_literal: If you're going to stand in my way again, I'll just have to fight you!
255813336.english: Couldn't get enough of us, eh? Too bad the feeling ain't mutual!

566072884.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
566072884.jp_real: 少年ばか！気を抜くなよ！
566072884.english: This one's for all the marbles!

262798324.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
262798324.jp_real: 我が刃は疾風をも断つ！
262798324.english: Let me show ya how I make mincemeat outta the wind!

884557995.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
884557995.jp_real: 妙ちくりんな霊気が漂っとるのう。
884557995.en_literal: A weird aura is lingering around...
884557995.english: This freakish cold is hell on my knees!

266845744.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
266845744.jp_real: スケダチに感謝じゃな
266845744.english: Always nice to have a helping hand!

888319034.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
888319034.jp_real: 気勢を削がれるなよ！このまま切りこむがいい！
888319034.en_literal: Don't waste your time! I'll keep charging!
888319034.english: Keep up that fervor! Channel it into your attacks!

387330075.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
387330075.jp_real: あの男、単純明快で気持ちがいいわい！
387330075.en_literal: That guy's simple-mindedness is just too damn satisfying!
387330075.english: Gotta hand it to the man! He knows what he wants in life!

789832321.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
789832321.jp_real: マトがデカイ分、ヤイバが届きやすいの！
789832321.en_literal: The bigger the target, the easier it is to hit!
789832321.english: So much easier to bait a hook when the worm's big and fat!

726922807.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
726922807.jp_real: 足場にだけは注意せよ
726922807.en_literal: Just be careful of the tripwires!

195465126.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
195465126.en_literal: I'll break through with one move!
195465126.english: Hit 'em hard with a big ol' blast!

955881270.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
955881270.jp_real: ドーリー、攻略の仕方は以前とそう変わるまいって
955881270.en_literal: Well, the way to beat you hasn't changed at all.
955881270.english: No need to get fancy! We already know how to hack this beast!

720988743.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
720988743.jp_real: モンか何か知らんが、以前のようにはいかんぞ！
720988743.en_literal: I don't know what you're talking about, but it's not gonna go like before!
720988743.english: I'm no gate expert, but seems to me this one oughta stay shut!

98916817.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
98916817.jp_real: 完発を入れずに次も叩き込むぞ！
98916817.en_literal: I'll hit the next one without using Awakening!
98916817.english: Don't wait to attack! Go and swing it!

1035012291.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
1035012291.jp_real: マクシキは近い！あと一押しや！
1035012291.en_literal: The curtain's close! Just one more!
1035012291.english: Curtain call's closing in! I can feel it!

465637849.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
465637849.jp_real: その野郎、我が剣の極致が断ち切る！
465637849.en_literal: You scoundrel! My sword's ultimate technique will cut you down!
465637849.english: I'll clip your ambition before it kills us all!

200985422.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
200985422.jp_real: ケッカッカッカッカ！剣無双、渡るわい！
200985422.en_literal: Hah! I'll cut through your sword!
200985422.english: Heh heh heh heh! Ain't been this spry in years!

351514830.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
351514830.en_literal: I'm the one with the advantage!
351514830.english: My gears are spinning triple time!

196549545.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
196549545.en_literal: I'll give you a taste of what's coming!
196549545.english: See if you can survive this!

2216464.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
2216464.jp_real: 力がみなぎるのォ！若がえたよじゃァ！
2216464.en_literal: Power overflowing! I'm not a kid anymore!
2216464.english: Woo hoo! Never thought I'd get to feel this young again!

1050172938.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
1050172938.jp_real: こやつを救わにゃ死にきれんわい！
1050172938.en_literal: I can't kill this guy with just a score!
1050172938.english: Can't kick the bucket before rescuin' the kiddo!

714618290.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
714618290.jp_real: ケッケッケッ！神の化身にも刃は通るか！
714618290.en_literal: Hah! Even a demon of the gods can't withstand this blade!
714618290.english: Who says gods can't be diced?

520228545.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
520228545.jp_real: おそれわむよー！ただきるのみじゃ！
520228545.en_literal: That's unnecessary! I'll just cut through!
520228545.english: Abandon your fear, kiddos! Show that lizard who's boss!

428202482.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
428202482.jp_real: イイドオヨ！聞こえるかー！待っておれよ！
428202482.en_literal: I'm coming! Can you hear me? Wait for me!
428202482.english: Hang in there, lad! We'll getcha outta there!

321297114.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
321297114.jp_real: まだまだ！おくせずに攻め続けい！
321297114.en_literal: Not yet! Keep pressing the attack without hesitation!
321297114.english: Sometimes all you can do is show 'em tough love!

270592901.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
270592901.jp_real: ケェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェ

857143027.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
857143027.jp_real: その眼に態度、まるで操りのようじゃな。
857143027.en_literal: That attitude of yours... It's just like a puppet.
857143027.english: That calculating look in Lilith's eyes... she had it too.

1036885266.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
1036885266.jp_real: 急ぎ、奥へ向かわねばのう！
1036885266.en_literal: We must hurry and move deeper!
1036885266.english: This is no time to dilly-dally!

834776790.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
834776790.jp_real: 返り討ちにしてやるわい！
834776790.en_literal: I'll turn the tables on you!

366536017.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
366536017.jp_real: 派手に立ち回わるとするかの！
366536017.en_literal: You dare to stand before me so boldly?
366536017.english: Hoo-ee! We got ourselves a real dust-up goin'!

1069933145.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
1069933145.jp_real: ふむ。こやつら、とんだクセモノのようじゃのう。
1069933145.en_literal: Hmph. Those brats are quite the nuisance.
1069933145.english: You folks ain't very nice! You know that?

663209815.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
663209815.jp_real: やれやれ、刃が霜ついてかわいそうじゃわい。
663209815.en_literal: Alright, alright. Your blade's all rusted and pathetic.
663209815.english: My poor blade is frozen stiff! Gotta shake off the frost!

701323665.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
701323665.en_literal: No way, you're not getting away with this, Moriadomomi!
701323665.english: It's rude to interrupt a lady!

10777752.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
10777752.jp_real: 触媒とやらはどこにある
10777752.english: If I were a catalyst, where would I hide?

44387990.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
44387990.jp_real: エバトルバイじゃないぞ！若い衆よ！
44387990.en_literal: Now's not the time to be holding back! Let's go, kids!
44387990.english: Don't tell me you young'uns are tuckered out already!

277698595.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
277698595.jp_real: ティヤクシュシュッ！砂が鼻に入ったわい！
277698595.en_literal: Ugh... my nose is stuffed with sand!
277698595.english: Ugh! All this dust is murder on me nose!

837025033.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
837025033.jp_real: 何やらおかしな気配のする島じゃのう
837025033.en_literal: This island has a strange aura to it.
837025033.english: Somethin' 'bout this island rubs me the wrong way!

128611014.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
128611014.jp_real: このまま突破するぞい！
128611014.english: Like a hot knife through butter!

345995402.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
345995402.jp_real: よーしよーし！この調子で押し切るんじゃ！
345995402.en_literal: Alright! Let's finish this off with this momentum!
345995402.english: We'll have 'em wrapped up by supper!

597248809.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
597248809.jp_real: 道を空けてもらおうぜ！強団ヘイドもよ！
597248809.english: We're bustin' through whether ya like it or not!

1000982672.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
1000982672.jp_real: さすがに数が多いのう。油断するでないぞ。
1000982672.en_literal: You're outnumbered, so I can't afford to be careless.
1000982672.english: Well, no one said takin' on an army'd be easy!

862455915.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
862455915.jp_real: とにかく、切り伏せていくしかあるまいて！
862455915.en_literal: Anyway, I have no choice but to cut through!

742866230.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
742866230.jp_real: トーオの頂上へ急ぐぞ！
742866230.en_literal: I'll rush to the top of the tower!
742866230.english: Last one to the top is a rotten egg!

707411897.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
707411897.jp_real: ワシらの相手ではないわい！
707411897.english: Crawl back into the hole you came from!

611324603.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
611324603.jp_real: 何やら悪趣味な場所じゃのう
611324603.english: I've seen my share of ugly, but this place takes the cake!

441541803.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
441541803.english: Hah! I could do this all day!

51315548.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
51315548.en_literal: I'm not letting my guard down yet!

1059808728.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
1059808728.jp_real: 誰も彼もインユウデをしとる！

506734556.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
506734556.jp_real: お前さんらがいると心強いの
506734556.en_literal: With you guys around, I feel so much more confident!
506734556.english: It's smooth sailing with you guys!

172236793.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
172236793.jp_real: お前さんら、いい流れじゃったぞ！
172236793.en_literal: You guys are really hitting your stride!
172236793.english: Gave 'em some heat on that one!

298509850.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
298509850.jp_real: これもみんなのおかげじゃわい！
298509850.english: Couldn't have done it without ya!

182531420.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
182531420.jp_real: ワシらの後には草も生えん勢いじゃの！
182531420.en_literal: I'll follow in your footsteps with the momentum of a grassland fire!
182531420.english: We move so fast it's not even funny!

730741901.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
730741901.jp_real: ここからじゃぞ！お前さんら！
730741901.english: Out of the frying pan and into the fire!

710981221.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
710981221.jp_real: お前さんら、油断するでないぞ！
710981221.en_literal: You guys, don't let your guard down!
710981221.english: Don't rest on them laurels, people!

903946784.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
903946784.jp_real: この調子で次も頼むぞ！
903946784.en_literal: I'll take the next one too, in this mood!

640153922.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
640153922.jp_real: イキがピッタリじゃったわい！

770330737.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
770330737.jp_real: 気持ちいいくらいにうまくいったの！
770330737.en_literal: It went so well, it felt good!
770330737.english: Oh, I love a good group attack!

285811952.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
285811952.jp_real: してやったりじゃったな
285811952.english: And that was some good support!

441615700.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
441615700.english: I was thinkin' the same thing!

393996933.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
393996933.jp_real: 今のについてこられるとはのう！
393996933.en_literal: I can't believe you followed me!

807462652.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
807462652.jp_real: さーて、次の仕掛けに取り掛かるとするかの！
807462652.en_literal: Well then, shall we get started on the next trap?
807462652.english: No kiddin'! How's about we go another round!

702216817.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_1
702216817.jp_real: キヒヒッヒッヒ！準備は万全じゃわい！
702216817.en_literal: Hee hee hee! I'm all set!

502716867.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
502716867.jp_real: 集中は切らさぬようにの
502716867.english: Hi! Danger lurks around every corner!

270260022.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
270260022.en_literal: Hmph. The swordplay of the star people?
270260022.english: Astrals are a force to be reckoned with!

56541536.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
56541536.english: You're scintillating with the sword, ma'am!

548517099.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
548517099.jp_real: 目ざといのう！よう合わせてくれた！
548517099.en_literal: You're awake! Thanks for joining me!
548517099.english: You saw that coming, didn't you?

561108079.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
561108079.jp_real: やるノー、むすめっかー！

424931911.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
424931911.jp_real: まだ、まだ若い者には負けられんわい！
424931911.en_literal: I'm not going to lose to a young whippersnapper like you!
424931911.english: We sure showed the young folk a thing or two!

194799510.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
194799510.jp_real: 今のはなかなか良かったの
194799510.english: That one made my hair stand on end!

184754518.en_literal: Your thorns are quite the nuisance, aren't they?
184754518.english: You do some dazzling displays yourself, missy!

315271373.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
315271373.jp_real: おまえさんの攻めても鮮やかじゃったぞ
315271373.english: Ha! Not every day a half-living ghost calls YOU magic!

867395969.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
867395969.jp_real: そう褒められると照れくさいわい！
867395969.en_literal: I get all flustered when you praise me like that!
867395969.english: Shucks, sonny! You know how to make an old fart blush!

1057908935.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
1057908935.jp_real: キッキチ！まだまだ若いもんに負けんぞ！
1057908935.en_literal: I won't lose to a young'un like you!
1057908935.english: You spring chickens can't outspring me!

105321739.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
105321739.jp_real: ドンイン欲な目をしとるのう。とくと見てまらび！
105321739.en_literal: You're looking at me with such greed. Watch and learn!
105321739.english: Use them keen eyes and learn you a thing or two, sonny!

736765748.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
736765748.jp_real: トシノコウモバカニデキンジャロ？
736765748.en_literal: Even the old man can't be underestimated!
736765748.english: There's some things only age can teach ya, eh?

199111821.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
199111821.jp_real: そうじゃのう。この歳になっても学ぶことは多いわい。
199111821.en_literal: That's right. Even at my age, there's still so much to learn.

201906194.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
201906194.jp_real: 何を言うかん！お前さんの立ちすじも見事なもんじゃ！
201906194.en_literal: What are you talking about? Your track record is quite impressive too!
201906194.english: You're nothing to sneeze at yourself, missy!

655334710.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
655334710.jp_real: 大剣豪殿に褒められるとは、光栄じゃわい！
655334710.en_literal: To be praised by the Great Alliance Lord... what a delight.
655334710.english: Now that's a real honor coming from a spry martial artist such as yourself!

230365546.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
230365546.en_literal: You're not going to do it?
230365546.english: Like what you didn't see, huh?

181609255.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
181609255.jp_real: おめえらでない？むずかゆいわ
181609255.en_literal: I'm not going to praise you. You're too hard to deal with.

120795451.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
120795451.jp_real: おん？小難しいことはようわからんわい。
120795451.en_literal: Huh? I don't really understand complicated things.
120795451.english: What? I don't take no stock in your newfangled science!

895563457.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
895563457.jp_real: 学びたいかん？ならば見せてやるわい
895563457.en_literal: Want to learn? Then I'll show you!
895563457.english: I call it the Dartfish style! Wanna learn?

740871098.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
740871098.jp_real: チイイイ、チチチ。変幻自在とはまさにこのことじゃ。
740871098.en_literal: Hah! This is what I call a perfect match!
740871098.english: Hehehe, they don't call me the Phantom Fisher for nothing!

465990628.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
465990628.jp_real: おお、これは楽をしようとするでない？
465990628.en_literal: Oh, you're trying to make this easy on me, are you?
465990628.english: Wait a minute, sunny! I don't appreciate lollygaggers!

731394128.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
731394128.jp_real: なあああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああ
731394128.en_literal: What? That clumsy sword just happened to hit by accident?
731394128.english: No problem! I needed a warm-up for my sword arm! Hehe!

186672734.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
186672734.jp_real: ふむ、ちょっと本気を出しすぎたかな？
186672734.en_literal: Hmph. Did I get a bit too serious there?
186672734.english: Hmm. Reckon I must've laid it on a bit thick.

98328883.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
98328883.jp_real: あっつん、気づかれてしまったか。
98328883.english: Dang, you noticed! Means I'm gettin' rusty!

899886674.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
899886674.jp_real: チーチチチチ、追撃とはこうやるもんじゃ！
899886674.en_literal: Hah! This is how you pursue!

830631502.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
830631502.jp_real: ワシも上手くいくとは思わなんだがい！
830631502.en_literal: I didn't think it'd go this well!
830631502.english: Hey! I'm as shocked as you are!

154130111.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
154130111.jp_real: タイワを取れたいとも、しんとぎは人気が入り、最高潮じゃわい！
154130111.en_literal: Even if I'm captured, my mind's still sharp and in top form!
154130111.english: The body may weaken with age, but the mind and hand just keep getting more refined!

729833565.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
729833565.jp_real: チッ、チッ、チッ、チッ、チッ。褒め言葉として受け取っておくわい。
729833565.en_literal: I'll take that as a compliment.

597269380.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
597269380.jp_real: こんだけ息がそろっとりゃ大丈夫じゃの
597269380.en_literal: With this many allies gathered, we should be fine, right?
597269380.english: This crew just can't be beat!

933581145.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
933581145.jp_real: 頼もしい限りじゃわい！
933581145.en_literal: I'm not sure what you're asking.

497054509.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
497054509.jp_real: 騒ぐほどでもなかろうて
497054509.en_literal: No need to make such a fuss.
497054509.english: Yep! That was a whale of a wallop!

727877318.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
727877318.jp_real: ちぇっ、ちち、褒めたところで何も出せんぞい？
727877318.en_literal: Hmph. Even if I praise you, you won't come up with anything.
727877318.english: Haha! No hiding real skill, is there?

1048869019.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
1048869019.jp_real: チッチッチッチッ！やるノダンチョ！

881545810.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
881545810.jp_real: ほりほり！気を抜く暇はないぞい！
881545810.en_literal: Hurry up! We don't have time to be careful!

380830677.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
380830677.jp_real: ほれほれ、いっとる間に次がくるぞ！
380830677.en_literal: Hurry up, Rackam! The next one's coming!
380830677.english: We don't got time to be chewin' the fat, shunny!

1058707819.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
1058707819.jp_real: 若い者に言われると嬉しいの？
1058707819.en_literal: I'm flattered to be addressed by a youngster.
1058707819.english: Feels good to be in with the young folk!

909313297.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
909313297.jp_real: あー、いかんいかん。少し熱くなりすぎちまったわい。
909313297.en_literal: Alright, alright. Getting a bit too hot, aren't we?
909313297.english: Whoops! Got a little lost in the moment!

1062294181.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
1062294181.jp_real: まさに流れにサオウサスじゃな
1062294181.english: Hey! Having the right muse puts wind in my sails!

903673346.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
903673346.jp_real: ドーリー！ワシも続くとするかの！
903673346.en_literal: Hah! You think I'll just let you keep going?

470905289.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
470905289.jp_real: おぬしとなら、切れ間なく畳みかけられそうじゃ。
470905289.en_literal: If you're with me, I'll be able to overwhelm you endlessly.
470905289.english: With our speed, this'll be over before you can cry "Help! There's a troll combing my mustache!"

268074683.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
268074683.jp_real: カラダはあったまったかのう。ほれ、つぎいくぞ！
268074683.en_literal: Body warmed up yet? Alright, next!
268074683.english: Don't rest yet! We still gotta put you through your paces!

947260243.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
947260243.jp_real: ちょっと手が滑っただけなんじゃがのう。きっちり！
947260243.en_literal: Just slipped my hand, that's all.

874534138.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
874534138.jp_real: 心得た。ちょいと冷や水浴びせるとするか。
874534138.en_literal: Got it. How about a little cold shower?
874534138.english: Then let's send 'em blubberin' back home!

21717447.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
21717447.jp_real: キッキッキッ、チッチッ、そう褒められると励みになるわい。
21717447.en_literal: Hehehe, I'm so encouraged by your praise!
21717447.english: Ugh, stop it! You're making me wanna show off!

1033127311.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
1033127311.jp_real: うん、迷いなき良い剣じゃ
1033127311.en_literal: Hmph. A worthy opponent without hesitation.
1033127311.english: Bait your rod with diligence, and you'll catch victory!

120398551.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
120398551.jp_real: 後継者探し中のは大変じゃぞ
120398551.en_literal: It's tough looking for a successor, isn't it?
120398551.english: Angling for a successor is harder than deep-sea fishing!

471517620.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
471517620.jp_real: 存分に暴れてやるい！如何様にも合わせよう！
471517620.en_literal: Let's go wild! Let's go all out!
471517620.english: Slice 'em, dice 'em, and kick their keister!

761448371.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
761448371.jp_real: それは構わんが、無茶はするなよ。
761448371.en_literal: I don't care about that. Don't be reckless.
761448371.english: Sure thing, bub! Who we fishin' up?

901292970.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
901292970.jp_real: おいてはますますさかんなるべし。じゃよ。
901292970.en_literal: The tide is turning in our favor. Let's go!
901292970.english: People are like wine, missy! They deepen and complexify with age!

183287843.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
183287843.jp_real: ちっちっち！もうちょい大きな声でいっとくれ！
183287843.en_literal: Hey, Id! You should've shouted that a little louder!
183287843.english: You aren't the most eloquent, are you, shuddy?

100283249.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
100283249.jp_real: うーん。まだまだ若い頃の半分も動けとらんがの。
100283249.en_literal: Hmph. I can't even move half as much as I could when I was young.
100283249.english: Mmm. Nah. I was way more spry when I was a tadpole!

168583265.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
168583265.jp_real: おお！かの大剣豪と並び立つとあらば、光栄の極みじゃわい！
168583265.en_literal: Oh, to stand alongside such a great hero is the pinnacle of glory!
168583265.english: Now that's a real honor, considering he's a master of swordcraft!

1051157180.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
1051157180.jp_real: それを捉えておるお前さんの目も凄まじいがな！
1051157180.en_literal: Your eyes are quite something, aren't they?
1051157180.english: Sure do! There are few with eyes fast enough to keep up with me!

227112008.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
227112008.jp_real: 若いのー！その石、少し分けてもらいたいもんじゃー！
227112008.en_literal: Hey there! I'd like to borrow that seat for a bit!
227112008.english: To be in the throes of youth! Wish I still had an appetite like you!

699686752.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
699686752.jp_real: ほれほれ、礼を言うとる場合ではないぞい！
699686752.en_literal: Hey, hey! This ain't the time to be playing games!
699686752.english: Thank me after we've all made it safely back home!

205946741.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
205946741.jp_real: こっちさえ掴めば簡単じゃて！
205946741.en_literal: If I catch you, it'll be easy.
205946741.english: Learned a thing or two from guttin' fish!

784952095.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
784952095.en_literal: I'll never lose to a bullet!
784952095.english: Can't let your bullets hog all the glory!

78559238.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
78559238.jp_real: ほりほり！ニノたちにサマイ！
78559238.en_literal: Hurry, hurry! We're not ready for you!
78559238.english: Hold on, missy! It was too short!

565089314.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
565089314.jp_real: ハァハァ、光栄にござるわい！

61066008.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
61066008.jp_real: チッ、チッ、チッ！狙った魚を逃がさんわい！
61066008.en_literal: Heh heh heh! I won't let the fish I'm aiming for get away!
61066008.english: Ain't never let a catch slip away!

51303988.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
51303988.jp_real: そうせっくんな。せいてはことをしすんじるもんじゃって。
51303988.en_literal: That's the spirit! You've got to believe in what you're doing!
51303988.english: Sheesh! Can't we stop and smell the roses?

878137266.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
878137266.jp_real: 今のヒロヨルか。また腕を上げたの？
878137266.en_literal: You're showing off again? You're raising your arm once more?
878137266.english: Look at you, keeping up with my zip-zip-zapping!

618612981.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
618612981.jp_real: ちぇっ、ちちちん。そりゃ買いかぶりすぎじゃわい。
618612981.en_literal: Heh heh heh! That's way too much of a show-off!
618612981.english: Hehehehe, you've got an overactive imagination, missy!

502475168.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
502475168.jp_real: さすがいい目をしておるのう。お前さん、剣もやってみるか？
502475168.en_literal: You've got a sharp eye, Rackam. How about a little duel?
502475168.english: Nah, you did well! Remind me to learn you the sword, eh?

360257387.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
360257387.jp_real: おごらず油断せず。いい心構えじゃ。
360257387.en_literal: Hmph. No arrogance, no carelessness. That's a fine mindset.
360257387.english: Long as we're breathin', we all got room to grow!

820698022.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
820698022.jp_real: ワシはただの釣り人なんじゃがのう。キヒヒヒヒヒヒ！
820698022.en_literal: I'm just a simple fisherman, you know.
820698022.english: Not bad for an old fisherman, eh?

783544105.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
783544105.jp_real: と言って、まだまだ余裕に見えるが
783544105.en_literal: You may look calm and collected, but...
783544105.english: But with you, missy, all bets are off!

450832997.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
450832997.jp_real: おお、フェリ。調子はどうだい？この戦場でまた会えるなんて、本当に嬉しいよ。準備は万全だ。さあ、一緒にこの戦いを制してやろうじゃないか！
450832997.en_literal: I'm always ready for a good fight.
450832997.english: I'll keep my toes with shoes.

315963080.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
315963080.jp_real: やめとけー！今のおぬしの型を崩しても得にならんわい！
315963080.en_literal: Stop it. Even if you break the current form, you won't gain anything.
315963080.english: You've found your own style, son! That's all you need!

357404781.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
357404781.jp_real: ずいぶんと男前に見られたもんじゃ。きひひひひひひ。
357404781.en_literal: You've been quite the show-off. Hee hee hee hee!
357404781.english: Am I what you young folk would call hardcore?

287917104.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
287917104.jp_real: 決意のこもったいい炎じゃない
287917104.en_literal: A determined and good flame, isn't it?
287917104.english: Woo-ee! Somebody get this young man on a stage!

284608519.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
284608519.jp_real: ちっ、ちっ、ちっ、まぐれじゃよ、まぐれ

647408085.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
647408085.jp_real: お前さんのかてになるなら、わしのけんもすてたもんじゃないの。
647408085.en_literal: If I'm going to be your weapon, I'd have thrown away my sword long ago.
647408085.english: Nurturing the young folk! Ain't that what it's all about?

73548993.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
73548993.jp_real: すなわち、虚虚禅として修練。
73548993.en_literal: In other words, I am the ultimate weapon.
73548993.english: And know not if we dreamt of a butterfly, or if a butterfly dreamt of us!

635154285.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
635154285.jp_real: チヒヒヒヒヒ！望むところじゃわい！
635154285.english: Took the words right out of my piehole!

482177747.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
482177747.jp_real: こりゃあまたとんだジャジャ馬じゃわい！
482177747.en_literal: Looks like you've got another one of those crazy jacks!
482177747.english: Sure thing, Mishi! They'll never see it comin'!

464688091.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
464688091.jp_real: ジャノー！次はどう仕掛ける？
464688091.english: The war never ends, does she?

512995766.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
512995766.jp_real: ズカァァァ！ワシまで骨抜きにせんでもよかろう！
512995766.en_literal: I don't need to be treated like a piece of meat!
512995766.english: Ugh! You were this close to guttin' me with that spell!

751215916.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
751215916.jp_real: ん？おお、いかにか。そうじゃったな。
751215916.en_literal: Huh? Oh, you're here. I see.

552321326.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
552321326.jp_real: おう？昔取った杵柄ちゅうやつじゃよ？
552321326.en_literal: Oh? You're that guy who used to hang around Kinesuka, aren't you?
552321326.english: No miracles about it, bub! It was all hard work!

72979853.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
72979853.jp_real: 風の吹くまま揺れるがまま、じゃな。
72979853.en_literal: The wind blows, and the leaves tremble... not quite.
72979853.english: You know what they say? Float like a jellyfish, sting like a bigger jellyfish!

214641568.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
214641568.jp_real: そちらの腕前も達者じゃのう？
214641568.en_literal: You're not so tough without your arm, are you?
214641568.english: You can say that again, missy!

1018901394.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
1018901394.jp_real: なんじゃと？もっといたおらんかい？
1018901394.en_literal: What's the matter? You're not hurt, are you?
1018901394.english: Ha! Actually, I wouldn't mind havin' a break meself!

950409662.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
950409662.jp_real: キッキッキッキッ！油断も隙もならぬ娘っ子じゃのう！
950409662.en_literal: Heh heh heh! What a reckless little girl!
950409662.english: Heh heh! You'll never miss a beat, do ya lass?

665636246.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
665636246.jp_real: じっくりと見て盗むことじゃな
665636246.en_literal: I'm not stealing it by just watching it carefully.
665636246.english: Just need to get the technique down. Now watch closely!

1557191.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
1557191.jp_real: お前さんが無駄な動きをせんぶ合わせやすいわい
1557191.en_literal: Your useless moves make it so easy to counter.
1557191.english: Your attention to detail makes coordination a breeze!

247252376.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
